name: AI-Novel-Writing-Assistant
desc: 面向长篇小说创作的 AI Native 开源系统，用 Agent、世界观、写法引擎、RAG 和整本生产工作流，帮助新手从一句灵感走到完整小说。AI-native engine for end-to-end novel creation — from idea to full chapters, with struct…
descFull: 面向长篇小说创作的 AI Native 开源系统，用 Agent、世界观、写法引擎、RAG 和整本生产工作流，帮助新手从一句灵感走到完整小说。AI-native engine for end-to-end novel creation — from idea to full chapters, with structured planning, worldbuilding, and agent-driven workflows.
